installCommand: curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable --profile minimal && . "$HOME/.cargo/env" && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && curl https://rustwasm.github.io/wasm-pack/installer/init.sh -sSf | sh && corepack enable && cd web && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
buildCommand: . "$HOME/.cargo/env" && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir web/src/lib/wasm -- --features wasm && cd web && pnpm build
